base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of breakable_block — a tile from 1986 castlevania. Brick wall that hides items — looks identical to regular wall until whipped. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Brick wall that hides items — looks identical to regular wall until whipped; 2-frame break-shatter. Holds meat or invisible-potion
